---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new skill or command
labels: enhancement
---

**Skill name**
<!-- e.g. forge:performance -->

**What it would do**
<!-- One paragraph: what problem it solves, what output it produces -->

**Trigger conditions**
<!-- When should this skill auto-activate? -->

**Would you build it?**
- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] No, requesting someone else builds it

**Reference skills**
<!-- Which existing skills are most similar? -->
